Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being validated
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
BigDecimalPrecisionValidator, BigDecimalValidator, ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleIntegerValidator<S,T>, FloatingPointValidator<T>, IntegerValidator<T>, NumberValidator<T>, PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator<T>, PrimitiveIntegerValidator<T>, PrimitiveNumberValidator<T>, SizeValidator
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractDoubleValidator, AbstractFloatValidator, AbstractIntegerValidator, AbstractNumberValidator, BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorImpl, BigDecimalScaleValidatorImpl, BigDecimalValidatorImpl, DoubleValidatorImpl, FloatValidatorImpl, IntegerValidatorImpl, LongValidatorImpl, NumberValidatorImpl, PrimitiveDoubleValidatorImpl, PrimitiveFloatValidatorImpl, PrimitiveIntegerValidatorImpl, PrimitiveNumberValidatorImpl, ShortValidatorImpl, SizeValidatorImpl
public interface ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,T>
Validates the requirements of a value that extends Number but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a NumberValidator.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    S
    isMultipleOf(T divisor)
    Ensures that the actual value is a multiple of the specified value.
    S
    isMultipleOf(T divisor, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is a multiple of the specified value.
    S
    isNegative()
    Ensures that the actual value is negative.
    S
    isNotMultipleOf(T divisor)
    Ensures that the actual value is not a multiple of the specified value.
    S
    isNotMultipleOf(T divisor, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is not a multiple of the specified value.
    S
    isNotNegative()
    Ensures that the actual value is not negative.
    S
    isNotPositive()
    Ensures that the actual value is not positive.
    S
    isNotWholeNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is not a whole value.
    S
    isNotZero()
    Ensures that the actual value is not zero.
    S
    isPositive()
    Ensures that the actual value is positive.
    S
    isWholeNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is a whole value.
    S
    isZero()
    Ensures that the actual value is zero.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableValidator

    isBetween, isBetweenClosed, isComparableTo, isComparableTo, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isLessThan, isLessThan, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isNotComparableTo, isNotComparableTo

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectValidator

    asString, asString, getActual, getFailures, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isNegative

      S isNegative()
      Ensures that the actual value is negative.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not negative

    • isNotNegative

      S isNotNegative()
      Ensures that the actual value is not negative.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is negative

    • isZero

      S isZero()
      Ensures that the actual value is zero.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not zero

    • isNotZero

      S isNotZero()
      Ensures that the actual value is not zero.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is zero

    • isPositive

      S isPositive()
      Ensures that the actual value is positive.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not positive

    • isNotPositive

      S isNotPositive()
      Ensures that the actual value is not positive.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is positive

    • isWholeNumber

      S isWholeNumber()
      Ensures that the actual value is a whole value.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not a whole number

    • isNotWholeNumber

      S isNotWholeNumber()
      Ensures that the actual value is not a whole value.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is a whole number

    • isMultipleOf

      S isMultipleOf(T divisor)
      Ensures that the actual value is a multiple of the specified value.
      Parameters:
      divisor - the value being divided by
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if divisor is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not a multiple of divisor

    • isMultipleOf

      S isMultipleOf(T divisor, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is a multiple of the specified value.
      Parameters:
      divisor - the value being divided by
      name - the name of the divisor
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if divisor or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not a multiple of divisor. If name is blank.

    • isNotMultipleOf

      S isNotMultipleOf(T divisor)
      Ensures that the actual value is not a multiple of the specified value.
      Parameters:
      divisor - the value being divided by
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if divisor is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is a multiple of divisor

    • isNotMultipleOf

      S isNotMultipleOf(T divisor, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is not a multiple of the specified value.
      Parameters:
      divisor - the value being divided by
      name - the name of the divisor
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if divisor or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is a multiple of divisor. If name is blank.
